steps.title: Find the signal
steps.content: The colon reveals that scholars have drawn connections linking modern Hawaiian writers to traditional Kanaka Maoli stories—this indicates a thematic thread bridging past and present.

steps.title: Match the concept
steps.content: Define: the blank names a feature of Hawaiian literature that is evidenced by scholars connecting modern writers to traditional Kanaka Maoli stories — a sustained link between past and present. Substitute each choice: A) subtlety — describes delicate or understated craft, not a historical connection across time; eliminated. B) sophistication — describes complexity or refinement, not a thematic thread linking eras; eliminated. C) continuity — means an unbroken connection over time; scholars tracing modern works back to traditional stories is the definition of continuity; fits perfectly. D) innovation — means novelty or newness, which is the opposite of linkage to tradition; eliminated. Verdict: C is correct.
